title: Economic survey reports positive growth in Arwal assembly segment
snippet_text: Local growth indicators and agricultural trade volumes in Arwal show upward trends, becoming a talking point for local candidates.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Arwal
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Arwal assembly segment.

snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Arwal promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Arwal, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.
